mentions.note: Down 23% from Oct 2025 high to $83; strong Q results (F1 +14% rev, +20% EBITDA; Liberty +23% rev, +38% EBITDA); Apple TV rights deal ($140M/yr vs $85M ESPN) kicking in; Wells Fargo upgraded to equal-weight ($95 PT); pure F1 play after Dec 2024 spinoff; 42x '26E expensive but historically cheapest on PE since IPO; scarcity value warrants premium; terrific opportunity.
